meaning_vi: Dem so cot thong tin nha o/tai san bi thieu tren tung khach hang.
value_1_meaning: Neu bang 1: khach hang thieu dung 1 cot trong nhom thong tin nha o/tai san.
value_0_meaning: Neu bang 0: khach hang co du tat ca cot trong nhom thong tin nha o/tai san.
presentation_note: Dung de do muc do thieu thong tin, khong phai bien dung/sai.

source_columns: APARTMENTS_AVG; BASEMENTAREA_AVG; YEARS_BEGINEXPLUATATION_AVG; YEARS_BUILD_AVG; COMMONAREA_AVG; ELEVATORS_AVG; ENTRANCES_AVG; FLOORSMAX_AVG; FLOORSMIN_AVG; LANDAREA_AVG; LIVINGAPARTMENTS_AVG; LIVINGAREA_AVG; NONLIVINGAPARTMENTS_AVG; NONLIVINGAREA_AVG; FONDKAPREMONT_MODE; HOUSETYPE_MODE; WALLSMATERIAL_MODE; EMERGENCYSTATE_MODE
meaning_vi: Ty le cot nha o/tai san bi thieu tren tong 18 cot.
value_1_meaning: Neu bang 1.0: thieu 100% cot trong nhom nha o/tai san.
value_0_meaning: Neu bang 0.0: khong thieu cot nao trong nhom nha o/tai san.
presentation_note: Dung khi muon so sanh theo ty le thay vi so luong cot.

meaning_vi: Co danh dau khach hang co thieu bat ky thong tin nha o/tai san nao hay khong.
value_1_meaning: Flag = 1: co it nhat 1 cot nha o/tai san bi missing.
value_0_meaning: Flag = 0: khong cot nha o/tai san nao bi missing.
presentation_note: Day la bien co/khong de giu lai tin hieu missing thay vi xoa dong/cot.
